changes.details: Text model benchmarks v2.3 published. Triple-evaluator system (Claude Opus 4.6 + Gemini 3.1 Pro + GPT-5.2). 5 models tested across 28 prompts (21 task + 7 creative). 140 evaluations with 3-way inter-rater reliability.
Replicate Flux Pro pricing increased from $0.04 to $0.055 per image (37.5% increase). Other services stable.
Health checks for 7 image generation services. 6 services at 100% uptime. Black Forest Labs Flux Pro showing 0% uptime (timeout issues on health endpoint).
